rows.label: xs06010100_MSG0090
rows.name:
What are you doing! Fight back[ST:wide ]―
Don't let them get close![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06010100_MSG0001_02
rows.name:
Are you saying even the
Doll Squad is powerless?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06010100_MSG0002
rows.name:
I think we'll just needlessly wear down
our soldiers doing any more than this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06010100_MSG0003
rows.name:
Even though it's a clue leading to
the Great One that we finally found.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06010100_MSG0004
rows.name:
But the space surrounding this planet
is only 800 exedits in diameter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06010100_MSG0005
rows.name:
If you travel at light speed for three days,
the event space just loops back around, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06010100_MSG0006
rows.name:
Isn't it true that neither the Samaar Federation home
world nor the Great One are anywhere in this space?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06010100_MSG0008
rows.name:
It was one thing fighting those guys in that
galactic frontier called Earth, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06010100_MSG0009
rows.name:
being enveloped in some weird light, and next
thing we know, we're on this primitive planet....[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06010100_MSG0010
rows.name:
And to top it off, even
Earthlings are here too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06010100_MSG0011
rows.name:
Even if someone told me this was
the afterlife, I'd believe them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06010100_MSG0012
rows.name: That's precisely why.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06010100_MSG0013
rows.name:
To transcend the limits of this
phenomenon, we must obtain THAT thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06010100_MSG0014
rows.name: Luxaar-sama.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06010100_MSG0015
rows.name: What is it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06010100_MSG0016
rows.name: Actually[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06010100_MSG0018
rows.name: Such a person exists?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06010100_MSG0019
rows.name: Interesting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06010100_MSG0020
rows.name:
That proposal might be
amusing to go along with.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06010100_MSG9000
rows.name: [ST:wide ]― Growth Flagship [ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
